title: Where does this image of an Eva without armour come from
display_title: Where does this image of an Eva without armour come from
wikitext:
[]: Where does this image of an Eva without armour come from?             Quote Post by Th3Marauder » Sat Jun 01, 2013 3:16 pm Hi, long time lurker, new member. Just curious, I've seen this image around the boards a few times and just online as well: I'm wondering if it is actually official in any capacity? Like is this an actual production design of Unit-01, or any of the evas, without their armour? Also another question this raises for me; is this what the FAR looked like then? Because I was under the impression that they would've looked just like Adam or Lilith.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Jun 01, 2013 4:19 pm It's fan-art by an early forum member Nephelim .

[]:             Quote Post by Rahxephon » Mon Jun 03, 2013 10:52 pm That's a very good interpretation though it looks just like how I'd expect unit 01 to look with the core and green eyes. it might as well be official. We never saw the whole thing armorless but we saw the head without armor and the arm and the core exposed by themselves at different times so this is exactly how it should look I believe. The FAR looking something like this is very interesting

[]:             Quote Post by Jurrasic » Tue Jun 04, 2013 3:22 am Pretty good guess imo! I like the mini Sachiel-style 'bird-mask' in the centre of the face, a nice tie in of the angelic association. My only beef: no mouth!

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Jun 04, 2013 4:39 am Jurrasic wrote: I like the mini Sachiel-style 'bird-mask' in the centre of the face, a nice tie in of the angelic association.

[]:             Quote Post by Rahxephon » Wed Jun 05, 2013 11:40 am Reichu wrote: That was actually shown in episode 02. A mouth, butt cleavage, four nostrils, and separate toes (with toenails) would do this Eva good. Lower arms and hands also have a "flayed" look inconsistent with parts of the show. Not really sure what a naval is doing there, either. It's a good drawing, but it kind of lacks the "breath of life" for me. It's a bit stiff and rubbery-looking. The lithe grace and latent beastliness is totally absent. I really can't, for example, imagine this particular Eva going apeshit on Angels and eating them.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Jun 05, 2013 12:25 pm Rahxephon wrote: Looks just about perfect to me
